brand_identity.name: Linea Reformer Pilates
brand_identity.target_audience: Women seeking strength and elegance in a premium environment

primary.description: Dark Goldenrod - Used for primary actions, active states, and key brand elements.

secondary.description: Pale Gold/Beige - Used for secondary buttons, card backgrounds, and soft highlights.

background.description: Warm Off-White/Bone - Main app background. Avoid pure white #FFFFFF.

foreground.description: Soft Black/Charcoal - Primary text color. Never use pure black #000000.

accent.description: Metallic Gold - Used for icons, thin borders, and decorative elements.

hero_welcome.usage: Home screen welcome card background or Login screen hero

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 h-12 px-8 rounded-full font-medium transition-all duration-300 shadow-soft hover:shadow-hover hover:-translate-y-0.5
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 h-12 px-8 rounded-full font-medium transition-all duration-300
buttons.outline: border-2 border-primary text-primary hover:bg-primary/5 h-12 px-8 rounded-full font-medium transition-all duration-300
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-accent/10 text-foreground hover:text-primary h-10 px-4 rounded-full transition-colors

cards.base: bg-white border border-border/50 rounded-3xl shadow-soft p-6 relative overflow-hidden
cards.glass: bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/20 rounded-3xl shadow-glass p-6
cards.interactive: cursor-pointer transition-all duration-300 hover:border-primary/30 hover:shadow-hover group

inputs.base: h-12 rounded-xl border-input bg-white/50 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20 focus:border-primary transition-all duration-200

navigation.bottom_bar: fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-xl border-t border-border/40 h-20 pb-2 z-50 flex items-center justify-around shadow-[0_-4px_20px_rgba(0,0,0,0.03)]

mobile_first.container: max-w-[428px] mx-auto min-h-screen bg-background relative shadow-2xl overflow-hidden

login.layout: flex flex-col justify-center items-center h-screen p-8 bg-background relative overflow-hidden
elements: Background: Subtle gradient or blurred image
Form: Phone input with country code

sections.style: col-span-2 bg-primary text-white p-6 rounded-3xl relative overflow-hidden
col-span-1 bg-white border border-primary/20 p-4 rounded-2xl flex flex-col justify-center items-center

anti_ai_rules: Avoid generic 'SaaS Blue' - stick to the Gold/Bone palette.
Do not use standard shadows - use colored shadows (gold-tinted).
Typography must mix Serif (Headings) and Sans (Body) for that 'Editorial' look.
Use texture (noise/grain) on backgrounds if possible to avoid 'digital flatness'.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure Gold text is only used on Dark backgrounds, or Dark Grey text on Gold backgrounds.
accessibility.touch_targets: All interactive elements must be min 44px height.

instructions_to_main_agent: You are building a luxury mobile web app. Prioritize the 'feel' of the application. It should feel like entering a high-end spa. Use the provided image URLs for backgrounds and cards. Implement the bottom navigation as a fixed element. Ensure all text is in Bosnian as specified in the page breakdowns. Use the 'lucide-react' library for icons. Create a 'Layout' component that handles the mobile container constraint (max-w-[428px]) to simulate a native app experience on desktop browsers.
